spec.rawSql:
SELECT table_total_rows AS value
FROM batch_table_metadata
WHERE table_id = '$table_id'
ORDER BY processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT batch_added_files_size_bytes AS value
FROM batch_table_metadata
WHERE table_id = '$table_id'
ORDER BY processing_date_hour DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS "time",
  column_name,
  completeness
FROM batch_table_profiling
WHERE table_id::text = '${table_id}'
  AND completeness IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT
  processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS "time",
  column_name,
  mean
FROM batch_table_profiling
WHERE table_id::text = '${table_id}'
  AND mean IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT
  processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS "time",
  column_name,
  standard_deviation
FROM batch_table_profiling
WHERE table_id::text = '${table_id}'
  AND standard_deviation IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT
  processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS "time",
  column_name,
  minimum
FROM batch_table_profiling
WHERE table_id::text = '${table_id}'
  AND minimum IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT
  processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS "time",
  column_name,
  maximum
FROM batch_table_profiling
WHERE table_id::text = '${table_id}'
  AND maximum IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT
  processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS "time",
  column_name,
  max_length
FROM batch_table_profiling
WHERE table_id::text = '${table_id}'
  AND max_length IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT
  processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS "time",
  column_name,
  approx_count_distinct
FROM batch_table_profiling
WHERE table_id::text = '${table_id}'
  AND approx_count_distinct IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT table_total_size_bytes AS value
FROM batch_table_metadata
WHERE table_id = '$table_id'
ORDER BY processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS "time",
  column_name,
  min_length
FROM batch_table_profiling
WHERE table_id::text = '${table_id}'
  AND min_length IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT
  processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS "time",
  column_name,
  distinctness
FROM batch_table_profiling
WHERE table_id::text = '${table_id}'
  AND distinctness IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT batch_added_files AS value
FROM batch_table_metadata
WHERE table_id = '$table_id'
ORDER BY processing_date_hour DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT table_total_files AS value
FROM batch_table_metadata
WHERE table_id = '$table_id'
ORDER BY processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  MAX(processing_date_hour) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS value
FROM batch_table_metadata
WHERE table_id::text = '${table_id}';

SELECT
  processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS "time",
  table_total_rows AS "Total Rows"
FROM batch_table_metadata
WHERE table_id = '$table_id'
  AND $__timeFilter(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  processing_date_hour AS "time",
  batch_added_rows AS "Added Rows"
FROM batch_table_metadata
WHERE table_id = '$table_id'
  AND $__timeFilter(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT 
    column_name AS "Column",
    data_type AS "Type",
    completeness AS "Completeness",
    distinctness AS "Distinctness",
    approx_count_distinct AS "Approx Distinct",
    mean AS "Mean",
    standard_deviation AS "Std Dev",
    minimum AS "Min",
    maximum AS "Max",
    min_length AS "Min Length",
    max_length AS "Max Length"
FROM batch_table_profiling
WHERE table_id = '$table_id'
AND processing_date_hour = (
    SELECT MAX(processing_date_hour AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')  
    FROM batch_table_profiling 
    WHERE table_id = '$table_id'
)
ORDER BY column_name;

SELECT batch_added_rows AS value
FROM batch_table_metadata
WHERE table_id = '$table_id'
ORDER BY processing_date_hour DESC
LIMIT 1;

spec.name: table_name
spec.label: Table Name

spec.query: SELECT catalog_name || '.' || schema_name || '.' || table_name FROM tables ORDER BY 1
spec.rawSql: SELECT catalog_name || '.' || schema_name || '.' || table_name FROM tables ORDER BY 1

spec.definition: SELECT catalog_name || '.' || schema_name || '.' || table_name FROM tables ORDER BY 1

spec.name: table_id
spec.label: Table ID

spec.__legacyStringValue: SELECT id FROM tables WHERE catalog_name || '.' || schema_name || '.' || table_name = '$table_name'

spec.definition: SELECT id FROM tables WHERE catalog_name || '.' || schema_name || '.' || table_name = '$table_name'
